creator: nivo+kw+ports.bfa274@is-root.com
text:
After a few months, it has become apparent to me that maintaining the ca-roots port without being
heavily involved in security@ is kind of a strange situation, since security@ is pretty much the team
that everything has to pass by involving security on FreeBSD (including certificates).

Since I don't have the time at hand to become more involved with security@, I'd like to return the port 
back from where it came: ports@

If security@ wants to pick it up, thats fine with me as well.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
